item.title: Dump Truck Suspension Machining & Welding
item.description: See machining and welding restore a dump truck’s suspension part. How does precision repair extend heavy equipment life?

media:content.media:title: Dump Truck Suspension Machining & Welding
media:content.media:description: See machining and welding restore a dump truck’s suspension part. How does precision repair extend heavy equipment life?

item.title: Sunnen HTA‑4100 Honing: Cross Hatch Finish
item.description: Using the Sunnen HTA‑4100 honing machine to rough and finish with cross hatching. How does this process restore inner surfaces?

media:content.media:title: Sunnen HTA‑4100 Honing: Cross Hatch Finish
media:content.media:description: Using the Sunnen HTA‑4100 honing machine to rough and finish with cross hatching. How does this process restore inner surfaces?

item.title: Equalizer Bar End Replacement
item.description: A cracked end on an equalizer bar demands replacement. How will machining and welding bring it back to life?

media:content.media:title: Equalizer Bar End Replacement
media:content.media:description: A cracked end on an equalizer bar demands replacement. How will machining and welding bring it back to life?

item.title: Planetary Carrier Needs Assistance
item.description: A planetary carrier requires machining help to get back in service. What repair techniques will restore its strength?

media:content.media:title: Planetary Carrier Needs Assistance
media:content.media:description: A planetary carrier requires machining help to get back in service. What repair techniques will restore its strength?

item.title: Big Cylinder Stuck in Place
item.description: A massive cylinder refuses to budge. What machining and repair steps will free it up?

media:content.media:title: Big Cylinder Stuck in Place
media:content.media:description: A massive cylinder refuses to budge. What machining and repair steps will free it up?

item.title: Quartz vs. Ripper Shank
item.description: Quartz proves too much for a ripper shank in this workshop test. What machining solution will overcome the challenge?

media:content.media:title: Quartz vs. Ripper Shank
media:content.media:description: Quartz proves too much for a ripper shank in this workshop test. What machining solution will overcome the challenge?

item.title: Cylinder Repair: Removing a Broomstick Obstruction
item.description: See the unusual task of removing a broomstick jammed inside a double‑acting cylinder. What’s the best way to clear such a blockage?

media:content.media:title: Cylinder Repair: Removing a Broomstick Obstruction
media:content.media:description: See the unusual task of removing a broomstick jammed inside a double‑acting cylinder. What’s the best way to clear such a blockage?

item.title: Tiny End Mill, Big Keyway
item.description: A small end mill cuts a full‑length 5mm keyway with precision. How can such a tiny tool deliver such a big result?

media:content.media:title: Tiny End Mill, Big Keyway
media:content.media:description: A small end mill cuts a full‑length 5mm keyway with precision. How can such a tiny tool deliver such a big result?

item.title: Extractor Test: Acetylene Smoke vs. Metal Arc Spray
item.description: Testing a shop‑made extractor with acetylene smoke before putting it against the metal arc spray machine. Will it withstand the ultimate challenge?

media:content.media:title: Extractor Test: Acetylene Smoke vs. Metal Arc Spray
media:content.media:description: Testing a shop‑made extractor with acetylene smoke before putting it against the metal arc spray machine. Will it withstand the ultimate challenge?

item.title: Custom Boring Bar for Hard‑to‑Reach Gear Face
item.description: Watch a custom‑made boring bar tackle a hard‑to‑reach gear face with accuracy. What machining tricks make this possible?

media:content.media:title: Custom Boring Bar for Hard‑to‑Reach Gear Face
media:content.media:description: Watch a custom‑made boring bar tackle a hard‑to‑reach gear face with accuracy. What machining tricks make this possible?

item.title: Precision Milling on a Vintage Sip Jig Borer
item.description: Experience precision milling using a vintage Sip jig borer, blending old craftsmanship with modern needs. How does this machine hold up against today’s standards?

media:content.media:title: Precision Milling on a Vintage Sip Jig Borer
media:content.media:description: Experience precision milling using a vintage Sip jig borer, blending old craftsmanship with modern needs. How does this machine hold up against today’s standards?

item.title: Vintage Slotting Attachment Rebuild
item.description: See the rebuild of a vintage slotting attachment brought back to life with precision machining. How does this classic tool still prove its worth today?

media:content.media:title: Vintage Slotting Attachment Rebuild
media:content.media:description: See the rebuild of a vintage slotting attachment brought back to life with precision machining. How does this classic tool still prove its worth today?

item.title: The Ultimate Showdown with a Seized Nut
item.description: When a nut refuses to budge, it’s time for ingenuity and brute force. What techniques finally break the grip of a stubborn, seized fastener?

media:content.media:title: The Ultimate Showdown with a Seized Nut
media:content.media:description: When a nut refuses to budge, it’s time for ingenuity and brute force. What techniques finally break the grip of a stubborn, seized fastener?

item.title: Heavy‑Duty Tool Extension for D11 Hub
item.description: The shop builds and tests a custom tool extension designed for the massive D11 hub. How does this innovation handle the extreme demands of heavy equipment repair?

media:content.media:title: Heavy‑Duty Tool Extension for D11 Hub
media:content.media:description: The shop builds and tests a custom tool extension designed for the massive D11 hub. How does this innovation handle the extreme demands of heavy equipment repair?

item.title: Broken Cylinder Eye Gets a Makeover
item.description: A worn‑out cylinder eye heads to the workshop for repair. What machining and welding steps can bring this critical part back to life?

media:content.media:title: Broken Cylinder Eye Gets a Makeover
media:content.media:description: A worn‑out cylinder eye heads to the workshop for repair. What machining and welding steps can bring this critical part back to life?

item.title: Solid Welds with the WIA Weldmatic 500i
item.description: Mounts are going onto a brand‑new barrel as Kurtis lays down precision welds with the WIA Weldmatic 500i. What makes this machine a go‑to for heavy fabrication work?

media:content.media:description: Mounts are going onto a brand‑new barrel as Kurtis lays down precision welds with the WIA Weldmatic 500i. What makes this machine a go‑to for heavy fabrication work?

item.title: Building a New Boom End and Fall Block
item.description: Instead of patching, the workshop builds a brand‑new boom end and fall block from scratch. How does this fabrication strengthen the crane’s future?

media:content.media:title: Building a New Boom End and Fall Block
media:content.media:description: Instead of patching, the workshop builds a brand‑new boom end and fall block from scratch. How does this fabrication strengthen the crane’s future?

item.title: Thread Cutting on CAT 24M End Caps
item.description: Cutting clean, precise threads on CAT 24M end caps demands steady hands and sharp tooling. What makes this machining process so critical?

media:content.media:title: Thread Cutting on CAT 24M End Caps
media:content.media:description: Cutting clean, precise threads on CAT 24M end caps demands steady hands and sharp tooling. What makes this machining process so critical?
